creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Works with cmake, arj 

does not works with binutils
===>>> binutils-2.33.1_1,1 >> (6)

===>>> The following actions will be taken if you choose to proceed:
	Re-install binutils-2.33.1_1,1
	Re-install ccache-3.7.1
	Re-install gettext-runtime-0.20.1
	Re-install gettext-tools-0.20.1_1
	Re-install gmake-4.2.1_3
	Re-install gmp-6.1.2_1
	Re-install mpfr-4.0.2

all installed and up-to-date.
